summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuildMap Vibe Coding experience. Backend APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend authentication and core Vibe Coding features are functional with all key components present and working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication state not consistently maintained across browser automation sessions

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (16/16 tests passed)
Login flow navigation from homepage to dashboard
Progress bar with 5 stages (فهم الفكرة، الفئة المستهدفة، المشكلة والحل، الميزات، المتطلبات التقنية)
Project summary panel on left side with project details
Vibe Coding interface layout and design
Responsive layout with proper Arabic RTL support
